title_romaji: Oji-san to Marshmallow: Hige-san to Yume Marshmallow
title_english: Ojisan to Marshmallow: Hige-san and Marshmallow
title_native: おじさんとマシュマロ 日下さんと夢マシュマロ
description_tr: Ojisan'ın Marshmallow'a evde yayınlanmasıyla birlikte yayınlanmamış bir bölüm.
description_en: An unaired episode bundled with the home release of Ojisan to Marshmallow.
